← Back to Chapter 1

🎯 Cluster Sort Challenge

Which PMM activities belong in each cluster?

How to Play

Drag each activity card into the correct cluster. Automated = agents handle it today. Augmented = human + agent collaboration. Elevated = irreducibly human.

👇 Drag these activities to the correct cluster
Market sizing
Stakeholder management
Win/loss analysis
Derivative content
Customer empathy
Positioning
Event logistics
Buyer personas
Thought leadership
Sales tools production
Pricing strategy
Cluster 1

Automated

Agents do most of this today
Cluster 2

Augmented

Human essential, agent accelerates
Cluster 3

Elevated

Irreducibly human
